blended.narrative: Pebble Creek is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.3" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 21.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 14" over the past week. Current depth: 40".
